title: Procurement (44-FZ / 223-FZ)

preview.teaser: Comprehensive solutions for educational institutions. Complete documentation package, 44-FZ and 223-FZ compliance.

subtitle: Supply of aerodynamic equipment for government and municipal needs
description: Engineer of Atmosphere LLC is a registered supplier on electronic trading platforms. We provide a complete documentation package for procurement under 44-FZ and 223-FZ.

1.title: Complete Documentation
1.description: Technical specification, certificates of conformity, warranty obligations

2.title: 44-FZ and 223-FZ Compliance
2.description: Participation in electronic auctions, quotation requests and tenders

3.title: Flexible Delivery Terms
3.description: Delivery, installation, commissioning and staff training on customer premises

4.title: Warranty and Service
4.description: Warranty service, technical support and spare parts supply

steps.1: Send a request for a commercial proposal
steps.2: Receive a quote with full specification and pricing
steps.3: Place procurement on the electronic trading platform
steps.4: Sign the contract and receive equipment
